app.title: aiui
app.status.not_connected: Claude Desktop config will be set automatically on next launch
app.status.background: Runs in the background — close this window any time

settings.http_error.title: aiui can't accept requests
settings.http_error.hint: Something else is holding port {port} on this Mac. Quit any old aiui instance, or check `lsof -nP -iTCP:{port}` for the squatter, then relaunch aiui.
settings.welcome.title: aiui — setup
settings.welcome.intro: Three small steps to your first demo window.
settings.welcome.step1.title: Setup checked
settings.welcome.check.desktop.miss: Claude Desktop config not registered — auto-installed on next app launch
settings.welcome.step2.title: Restart Claude Desktop
settings.welcome.step2.body: MCP tools are only loaded at app launch. Without a restart, Claude doesn't see aiui yet.
settings.welcome.step3.title: Paste the demo prompt into Claude
settings.welcome.step3.body: Shows a sortable list, select box, checkboxes, slider, color picker and colored buttons — all in one window with tabs.
settings.welcome.step3.tail: Paste in Claude → demo window opens on this Mac.
settings.welcome.demo.prompt:
Build me an aiui demo with `form` and two tabs:

“Game” — sortable list (`kind: "list"`, `sortable: true`, `items: [{label, value}, …]`) with 8 random world cities in wrong order. Task: sort them by population, descending.

“About me” — select for my mood, two checkboxes with everyday self-statements, slider 0–10 for something personal, color picker for my favorite color.

Plus three buttons in the form-level `actions` array (bottom row): Submit (success), Cancel (neutral), Destructive (red) “Reset everything”.

Make up the concrete content yourself, in the language of this session. When I answer: tell me how close I was to the correct city order and give a short witty take on the rest of my answers.
settings.remotes.title: Registered remote hosts
settings.remotes.empty.hint: Only needed if you run Claude Code on a remote host. Leave empty for local projects.
settings.remotes.add.title: Add a new remote
settings.remotes.add.hint: Adds the reverse tunnel to ~/.ssh/config, scp's the auth token to the host, and starts the tunnel.
settings.log.title: Recent
settings.restart.hint: Quits Claude Desktop and starts it again so it re-reads the current aiui entry from claude_desktop_config.json.
settings.uninstall.confirm: Really? Removes all aiui entries from configs and remote tokens.
settings.uninstall.done.title: aiui configuration removed
settings.uninstall.done.body: Configuration is gone. Click the red Quit button on the right, then drag aiui to the Trash in Finder — a running app can't remove itself.
settings.report.hint: Opens a new GitHub issue with version and build pre-filled.
